entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The crop species used for the high-throughput SNP genotyping study.

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISMS
entities.description: Abundant and evenly distributed markers used for genetic research in crops.

entities.name: GOLDENGATE ASSAY
entities.description: A high-throughput genotyping platform used to score a large number of SNP markers.

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINE POPULATIONS
entities.description: Genetic populations, including Zong3 x 87-1 and B73 x By804, used for genotyping.

entities.name: DIVERSITY PANEL
entities.description: A group of 154 diverse inbred lines used to test SNP scoring success.

entities.name: SIMPLE SEQUENCE REPEAT MARKERS
entities.description: Markers integrated with SNPs to construct a high-density linkage map.

entities.name: LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A genetic map constructed using SNP and simple sequence repeat markers.

entities.name: MINOR ALLELIC FREQUENCY
entities.description: The frequency of the less common allele in a population, used to characterize SNP markers.

entities.name: DIVERSITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: A genetic analysis application for which the GoldenGate assay SNPs are useful.

entities.name: MARKER-TRAIT ASSOCIATION STUDIES
entities.description: A research application for which the GoldenGate assay SNPs are useful.

entities.name: MARKER-AIDED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding application for which the GoldenGate assay SNPs are useful.
